footer.meta: © Fight Prophet · Information and education only — not financial advice.
lang.label: Language
home.heroTitle: Who is the greatest fighter of all time?
home.heroSub: Fight Prophet runs an AI & ML-powered fight-by-fight ranking engine: every UFC result earns or burns points, then the board splits into all-time, active, and weight-class GOAT lists. Predictions and rankings, built from data.
home.heroNote: For information and education only — not financial advice. Our predictions and estimates can be wrong.
home.rankTitle: All-time, active, and division GOAT rankings
home.rankCopy: No nostalgia ballot. No barbershop argument. The board is rebuilt from fight results, opponent quality, finishes, titles, streaks, inactivity, and losses.
home.scoreTitle: Points are won in the cage, then boosted for legacy.
home.scoreRule1Copy: Global points compare every UFC fighter across every weight class.
home.scoreRule2Copy: The active title holders — the live race without retired or long-inactive names.
home.scoreRule3Copy: Division tabs reveal the king of each class using the same point logic.
home.scoreRule4Copy: Elite wins, finishes, title stakes, bonuses, streaks, and defenses matter. Losses hurt.
home.cta5Desc: Open the stat sheet for any fighter
home.newsletterCopy: Weekly MMA predictions, ranking movement, fighter-card updates, and model notes from Uppercut Analytics.
home.finalTitle: Compare model picks vs. market for the upcoming fights.
edu.title: Betting Education
edu.intro: Enter two odds, see the math live — and the exact formula behind every number Fight Prophet shows. Educational only, not betting advice.
calc.heading: Odds calculator
calc.sub: Enter both fighters' American odds — the rest is computed live.
calc.note: Implied includes the book's margin; fair removes it. Leave a field blank and hold/fair can't be computed.
c1.title: American odds
c1.blurb: How a price pays on a $100 stake.
c2.title: Implied probability
c2.blurb: The break-even win rate a price implies.
c3.title: Sportsbook hold
c3.blurb: The book's margin baked into both prices.
c4.title: Fair probability
c4.blurb: Devigged, so both sides sum to 100%.
c5.title: Fair odds
c5.blurb: Fair probability turned back into a price.
c6.title: Expected value
c6.blurb: Average dollars per bet, over the long run.
c7.title: ROI
c8.title: Edge
c8.blurb: The model's gap over the fair price — the value signal.
c9.title: Parlays
c9.blurb: Legs multiply, so they are much harder to hit.
c2.signal: If it's above your model's %, there's likely no value.
c3.signal: Lower is better — under 3% is a sharp market.
c4.signal: Compare your model to this, not the raw price.
c5.signal: If the book pays more than fair odds, that is value.
c6.signal: Positive = the bet has value; negative = skip it.
c7.signal: Positive expected ROI means a long-term edge.
c8.signal: Edge above 0 is the green light — bigger is stronger.
c9.signal: Every leg cuts your real chance — stake smaller.
pred.title: MMA Predictions
pred.intro: Upcoming UFC fight predictions with model probability, market probability, edge, and signal strength. Educational only, not betting advice.
pred.modelGuide.title: Welcome to Fight Prophet predictions
pred.modelGuide.copy: Switch between models to compare how each system reads the same upcoming fights. Ensemble is the recommended default view.
pred.modelGuide.catboost: Gradient boosting optimised for structured / tabular MMA features.
pred.modelGuide.ensemble: Combines multiple learners to reduce single-model bias.
pred.modelGuide.logreg: Interpretable baseline that stabilises directional probability checks.
pred.empty.title: Predictions are temporarily unavailable.
pred.empty.copy: The upcoming cards feed reads from the exported dashboard parquet. Check back once the next event card export has landed.
pred.empty.noFights: No fights match the current filters.
pred.dynamic.pickNote: Model probabilities reflect historical patterns — check the disclaimer before acting on any output.
pred.bi.title: Betting intelligence
pred.bi.note: Math only — not betting advice. Hold & fair values need both sides' odds; "—" means data unavailable.

fighters.intro: Search tracked UFC fighters and inspect career snapshots, method mix, activity status, belt context, striking and grappling metrics, and recent fight history.
fighters.index.title: Fighter Index
fighters.overview.title: Overview
fighters.defense.title: Defense & Streaks

events.title: UFC & MMA Events History
events.intro: Browse tracked cards with fight-level results, model signal, market context, and event summaries from the same dashboard exports that power the analytics app.
events.archive.title: Event Archive
events.detail.noFights: Fight-level rows are not available for this event yet.
events.table.betRoiTitle: Realized return on a 1-unit bet on the model's pick, at the captured odds
events.empty.title: Events history is temporarily unavailable.
events.empty.copy: The public archive reads from the exported dashboard parquet feed. If this is empty, the latest export has not landed yet.
lab.title: Historical Picks & Model Metrics
lab.intro: Every past prediction is logged with the actual outcome so you can validate calibration, accuracy, and edge across thousands of historical MMA bouts. Compare Ensemble, CatBoost, and LogReg on the same fights.
lab.table.title: Historical Picks
lab.note.showingFirst: Showing first {max} of {total} — use filters to narrow.
lab.empty.noPicks: No picks match the current filters.
lab.empty.title: Fight Lab data is temporarily unavailable.
lab.empty.copy: The historical picks feed reads from the exported dashboard parquet. Check back once the latest export has landed.
rankings.title: How To Read The Fight Prophet Rankings
rankings.intro: The live ranking board is on the homepage, and this page explains what the rankings measure, what they do not measure, and why the same engine is shown globally and by division.
rankings.measure.title: What The Rankings Measure
rankings.measure.copy: Fight Prophet rankings are computed from fight-level data. The model rewards wins, opponent quality, finishes, title stakes, defenses, streaks, and long-term resume strength. It penalizes losses and inactivity so the active board does not simply mirror a historical legacy list.
rankings.global.title: Global Board
rankings.global.copy: The all-time board compares fighters across divisions with a common point scale. It is useful for legacy debates, but cross-era and cross-weight comparison always carries uncertainty.
rankings.divisions.title: Division Boards
rankings.divisions.copy: Division views keep the same scoring logic but compare fighters inside one weight class. This makes the top fighter in a class easier to read without forcing every division into the same conversation.
rankings.limitations.title: Known Limitations
rankings.limitations.olderRecords: Older records can be less complete than modern records.
rankings.limitations.weightMovement: Weight-class movement can make a fighter difficult to place cleanly.
rankings.limitations.variance: Short-notice fights, injuries, and judging variance are not perfectly knowable.
rankings.limitations.overrides: Manual overrides may be needed for retirements, vacancies, and unusual events.
rankings.open.title: Open The Board
